item.name: delivery-tracker

request.description:
Retrieves all delivery attempts for a specific event.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-42",
    "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
    "channel": "EMAIL",
    "status": "DELIVERED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
    "errorMessage": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:05"
  }
]
```

Response (404): No attempts found for the given event.

item.name: Get Attempts by Event and Channel

request.description:
Retrieves all delivery attempts for a specific event and channel.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-42",
    "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
    "channel": "EMAIL",
    "status": "DELIVERED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
    "errorMessage": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:05"
  }
]
```

Response (404): No attempts found.

Retrieves a single delivery attempt by its ID.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
  "userId": "usr-42",
  "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
  "channel": "email",
  "status": "DELIVERED",
  "attemptNumber": 1,
  "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
  "errorMessage": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:00",
  "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:05"
}
```

Response (404): Attempt not found.

Retrieves all delivery attempts for a specific user within the last 30 days.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-42",
    "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
    "channel": "EMAIL",
    "status": "DELIVERED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
    "errorMessage": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:05"
  }
]
```

Response (404): No attempts found for the user.

Records a delivery attempt for a notification event.

Response (201 Created):
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "eventId": "evt-001-20260617",
  "userId": "usr-123",
  "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
  "channel": "EMAIL",
  "status": "DELIVERED",
  "attemptNumber": 1,
  "messageId": "sendgrid_mock_evt-001-20260617_email",
  "errorMessage": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:00",
  "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T10:00:00"
}
```

Response (400): Invalid request body.

query.description: ISO-8601 timestamp — only attempts updated after this time are returned. Defaults to 24 hours ago.
Maximum number of attempts to return. Default: 100.

request.description:
Retrieves failed delivery attempts for retry processing, ordered by oldest update first.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 2,
    "eventId": "evt-002-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-99",
    "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
    "channel": "SMS",
    "status": "FAILED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": null,
    "errorMessage": "Provider unavailable",
    "createdAt": "2026-06-17T11:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T11:00:03"
  }
]
```

item.description:
REST API for recording and querying delivery attempt history.

Base URL: {{delivery_tracker_url}} (default: http://localhost:8003)

item.name: template-service

request.description:
Retrieves all templates in the database.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": "order-confirm",
    "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
    "name": "Order Confirmation",
    "subject": "Your Order #{{orderId}} Confirmed",
    "body": "Thank you for your order {{orderId}}. Total: ${{amount}}",
    "version": 1,
    "active": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T12:00:00"
  },
  {
    "id": "password-reset",
    "eventType": "PASSWORD_RESET",
    "name": "Password Reset",
    "subject": "Reset Your Password",
    "body": "Click the link to reset your password: {{resetLink}}",
    "version": 1,
    "active": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T12:00:00"
  }
]
```

Retrieves a template by ID without rendering.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "id": "order-confirm",
  "eventType": "ORDER_PLACED",
  "name": "Order Confirmation",
  "subject": "Your Order #{{orderId}} Confirmed",
  "body": "Thank you for your order {{orderId}}. Total: ${{amount}}",
  "version": 1,
  "active": true,
  "createdAt": "2026-01-01T00:00:00",
  "updatedAt": "2026-06-17T12:00:00"
}
```

Response (404): Template not found.

Retrieves a template and renders it with the provided payload.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "templateId": "order-confirm",
  "content": "Your Order #ord-789 Confirmed\n\nThank you for your order ord-789. Total: $99.99"
}
```

Response (404): Template not found.
Response (400): Invalid payload or missing required variables.

Checks whether a template exists and is active.

HTTP 200: Template exists and is active.
HTTP 404: Template not found or inactive.

item.description:
REST API for retrieving and rendering notification templates.

Base URL: {{template_service_url}} (default: http://localhost:8002)

item.name: notification-service

request.description:
Retrieves the high-level delivery status for a notification event.

For detailed per-channel delivery attempts, query the delivery-tracker service directly using the eventId.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "eventId": "evt-001-20260617",
  "status": "DELIVERED",
  "message": "Event has been processed. Query delivery-tracker service for detailed per-channel status."
}
```

Gets a link to query delivery attempts from the delivery-tracker service.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "eventId": "evt-001-20260617",
  "message": "Query delivery-tracker service at http://localhost:8003/api/v1/delivery-attempts/events/evt-001-20260617",
  "url": "http://localhost:8003/api/v1/delivery-attempts/events/evt-001-20260617"
}
```

item.description:
REST API for sending notifications, retrieving delivery status, and querying delivery attempts.

Base URL: {{notification_service_url}} (default: http://localhost:8001)

variable.description: Delivery channel - valid values: EMAIL, SMS, PUSH, WEBHOOK
Template ID - valid values: order-confirm, order-shipped, order-delivered, payment-failed, password-reset, account-created, user-invited, promotion-alert, fraud-alert, system-alert
Unique event identifier for the notification
